_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_44_note: Session 44 (2026-06-07, Sunday): ANET deep session (event_queue; June 5 price confirmation). Key corrections vs S43: TSM June 5 confirmed $415.17 (S43 est $428; actual -6.7% not -3.8%) → MoS -7.44% → HOLD (first non-SELL since S40). ASML June 5 confirmed $1,641.74 (S43 est $1,691; actual -6.59% not -3.8%) → MoS -31.6%. MRVL June 5 confirmed $278.60 (S43 est $289; actual -12.0% from $316.43 June 4 base, not -8.6% from wrong $301.65 base) → MoS -54.9%. ANET June 5 confirmed $154.49 (S43 est $157; -6.94% not -5.5%) → MoS -17.8%. ANET William Blair 46th Annual Growth Stock Conference (June 2): CFO Breithaupt cited TAM $50B→$105B→$160B by 2030; AI cycle 'multi-year to multi-decade.' TSMC May revenue not yet released (expected ~June 10). US BIS export controls extended to Chinese subsidiaries (June 1). Phase 1b/1c gated (44%6=2). No DCF run. ASML re-added to event_queue (June 5 -6.59% trigger). ANET removed from event_queue (processed).

event_queue.event: Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued post-earnings. June 5 confirmed close $864.01 (-13.2% from $996; SOX selloff). MoS -48.8%. Susquehanna PT $1,750. TrendForce Q2 DRAM +58-63% confirms thesis. No deep session before June 24.

May monthly revenue release ~June 10 (3 days). April was NT$410.73B (+17.5% YoY). June 5 confirmed $415.17 (-6.7% from $444.92 June 4). MoS -7.44% = HOLD (first HOLD since S40). If May ≥ NT$415B (new record), DCF re-run immediately — could shift MoS toward WAIT. Ex-dividend $0.955 ex-date June 11. Q2 earnings July 16.

June 5 confirmed close $358.05 (-1.51% vs SOX -10.3%; held up well). MoS -68.8% SELL/AVOID. UALink + NVLink Fusion stack-agnostic; 3 hyperscaler design wins confirmed. Deep session S40 (June 3). No new deep session needed.

June 5 confirmed $205.10 (-6.2% from $218.66 June 4; SOX -10.3% selloff). MoS -23.8% SELL/AVOID. DCF last run May 21 (17 days; threshold June 21). US BIS export controls extended to Chinese subsidiaries June 1 (no IV impact — zero China already modeled). Next primary catalyst: Q2 FY2027 earnings ~August 2026. Monitor.

June 5 confirmed $1,641.74 (-6.59% from $1,757.47 June 4; SOX selloff continuation; exceeds >3% trigger). S43 estimate was -3.8% to $1,691 — actual drop more severe. MoS -31.6% SELL/AVOID. DCF threshold June 21 (14 days away). No new company-specific news weekend June 6-7. Deep session S43 complete.

_event_queue_note: Session 44: ANET deep session complete (4 new entity entries: June 1 +5.77%, June 2 William Blair conference, June 4 -4.79%, June 5 -6.94%). ANET removed from event_queue. ASML re-added (June 5 -6.59% trigger; threshold >3%). TSM updated with confirmed $415.17 (HOLD). Priority next session: TSM May revenue ~June 10 (first item after MU gate; TSM now HOLD). After that: ASML DCF June 21, NVDA DCF June 21. MU gated until June 24.
